indications.text:
FUZEON in combination with other antiretroviral agents is indicated for the treatment of HIV-1 infection in
treatment-experienced patients with evidence of HIV-1 replication despite ongoing antiretroviral therapy.
This indication is based on results from two controlled studies of 48 weeks duration. ...
